---
title: "Assemblea BITS 2026 visualizations"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(lubridate)
  library(ggrepel)
})

main_folder <- here()
```

```{r}
quote_soci26 <- readxl::read_xlsx(file.path(main_folder,"soci2026/BITS-quote.xlsx"))

# extract info from codice fiscale
month_decode <- data.frame(letter = c("A","B","C","D","E","H","L","M","P","R","S","T"),
                           month = c("01","02","03","04","05","06","07","08","09","10","11","12")) %>%
  column_to_rownames("letter")
```

```{r}
quote_soci <- quote_soci26 %>%
  rename("type"=Tipo, "first_name"=Nome, "last_name"=Cognome, "tax_ID_code"="Codice fiscale") %>%
  mutate(member_since = as.Date(`Socio dal`, format = "%d/%m/%Y"), .after="type") %>%
  mutate(cf = gsub("([A-Z]*)([0-9]*)", "\\1 \\2 \\3", tax_ID_code), .after = tax_ID_code) %>%
  separate(cf, into = c("cognome_nome", "anno", "mese", "giorno", NA)) %>%
  mutate(anno = ifelse(anno > 26, gsub("^","19",anno), gsub("^","20",anno))) %>%
  mutate(mese = as.character(month_decode[mese,])) %>%
  mutate(gender = ifelse(giorno > 40, "F", "M"), .after=giorno) %>%
  mutate(giorno = ifelse(giorno > 40, as.numeric(giorno)-40, as.numeric(giorno))) %>%
  mutate(giorno = ifelse(giorno<10, str_pad(giorno, 2, pad = "0"), giorno)) %>%
  unite(birth, anno:giorno, sep="-") %>%
  mutate(birth=ifelse(birth=="NA-NA-NA",NA,birth)) %>%
  select(ID,type,last_name,first_name,member_since,birth,matches("^20(0[9]|1[0-9]|2[0-9])$") ) %>%
  mutate(age = trunc((birth %--% ymd(paste0(year(Sys.Date()), "-06-01")) ) / years(1)), .after=birth) %>%
  mutate(age_interval = cut(as.numeric(age), 
                            breaks = c(18,24,34,44,54,64,99), 
                            labels = c("18–24","25–34","35–44","45–54","55–64","65+"),
                            include.lowest = T), .after=age)


soci_regolari <- quote_soci %>%
  filter(`2026`=="SI")
```


```{r}
new_members_age_distribution <- quote_soci %>%
  filter(!last_name=="Finotello") %>% #removed because there are two different entries for this member
  mutate(year_joined = year(as.Date(member_since)),
         age_at_join = floor(interval(birth, member_since) / years(1))  ) %>%
  mutate(age_interval_at_join = cut(as.numeric(age_at_join), 
                            breaks = c(18,24,34,44,54,64,99), 
                            labels = c("18–24","25–34","35–44","45–54","55–64","65+"),
                            include.lowest = T), .after=age) %>%
  filter(!is.na(year_joined), !is.na(age_interval_at_join)) %>%
  group_by(year_joined, age_interval_at_join) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

p1 <- ggplot(new_members_age_distribution, aes(x = year_joined, y = count, fill = age_interval_at_join)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution of New Members per Year",
    x = "Year Joined",
    y = "New Members",
    fill = "Age Interval"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(t = 20)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 20))
  )
p1

p1 <- ggplot(new_members_age_distribution, aes(x = year_joined, y = count, fill = age_interval_at_join)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(
    min(new_members_age_distribution$year_joined),
    max(new_members_age_distribution$year_joined),
    by = 1 ) ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution of New Members per Year",
    x = "Year Joined",
    y = "New Members",
    fill = "Age Interval"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(t = 20)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 20)),
    
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
p1
```

```{r}
p1.b <- p1 +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution of New Members per Year",
    subtitle = "This bar chart shows the distribution of <b>new members</b> by <b>age interval</b> from <b>2003 to 2026</b>.<br>It helps highlight the shifting age demographics of incoming members each year."

  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 10, lineheight = 1.2)
  )
p1.b
```

```{r}
png(file.path(main_folder,"new_members_age_distr.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

p1.b

dev.off()
```



#----------------------

```{r}
# Median age at membership start
median_age_by_year <- quote_soci %>%
  filter(!last_name=="Finotello") %>%
  mutate(
    year_joined = year(as.Date(member_since)),
    age_at_join = floor(interval(birth, member_since) / years(1))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age_at_join)) %>%
  group_by(year_joined) %>%
  summarise(median_age = median(age_at_join)) %>%
  ungroup()

p2 <- ggplot(median_age_by_year, aes(x = year_joined, y = median_age)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f78b4", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "#1f78b4", size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(
    min(median_age_by_year$year_joined),
    max(median_age_by_year$year_joined),
    by = 1 ) ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Age at Membership Start",
    x = "Year Joined",
    y = "Median Age"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(t = 20)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 20)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
p2
```

```{r}
png(file.path(main_folder,"median_age_membership_start.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

p2

dev.off()
```



#----------------------

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggtext)

library(showtext)
font_add_google("Lato")
showtext_auto()
```

```{r}
# This theme extends the 'theme_minimal' that comes with ggplot2.
# The "Lato" font is used as the base font. This is similar
# to the original font in Cedric's work, Avenir Next Condensed.
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Lato"))


theme_update(
  # Remove title for both x and y axes
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  # Axes labels are grey
  axis.text = element_text(color = "grey40"),
  # The size of the axes labels are different for x and y.
  #axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, margin = margin(t = 5)),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, margin = margin(t = 5)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 17, margin = margin(r = 5)),
  # Also, the ticks have a very light grey color
  axis.ticks = element_line(color = "grey91", size = .5),
  # The length of the axis ticks is increased.
  axis.ticks.length.x = unit(1.3, "lines"),
  axis.ticks.length.y = unit(.7, "lines"),
  # Remove the grid lines that come with ggplot2 plots by default
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  # Customize margin values (top, right, bottom, left)
  plot.margin = margin(20, 40, 20, 40),
  # Use a light grey color for the background of both the plot and the panel
  # plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey98", color = "grey98"),
  # panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey98", color = "grey98"),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"),
  # Customize title appearence
  plot.title = element_text(
    color = "grey10", 
    size = 28, 
    face = "bold",
    margin = margin(t = 15)
  ),
  # Customize subtitle appearence
  plot.subtitle = element_markdown(
    color = "grey30", 
    size = 16,
    lineheight = 1.35,
    margin = margin(t = 15, b = 40)
  ),
  # Title and caption are going to be aligned
  plot.title.position = "plot",
  plot.caption.position = "plot",
  plot.caption = element_text(
    color = "grey30", 
    size = 13,
    lineheight = 1.2, 
    hjust = 0,
    margin = margin(t = 40) # Large margin on the top of the caption.
  ),
  # Remove legend
  legend.position = "none"
)
```


```{r}
df_binary <- quote_soci %>%
  #select(ID, matches("^20(0[9]|1[0-9]|2[0-5])$")) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("20"), ~ ifelse(. == "SI", 1, 0))) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("20"), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), 0, .)))

new_members_per_year <- df_binary %>%
  mutate(year_joined = year(as.Date(member_since))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(year_joined)) %>%
  count(year_joined, name = "new_members") %>%
  mutate(year_joined = as.character(year_joined))

years <- 2009:2026
# non-renewing members count for each year
non_renewed <- map_dfr(years[-1], function(y) {
  prev_year <- as.character(y - 1)
  curr_year <- as.character(y)

  n_non_renewed <- df_binary %>%
    filter(.data[[prev_year]] == 1, .data[[curr_year]] == 0) %>%
    nrow()

  tibble(year = y, non_renewed = n_non_renewed) %>%
    mutate(year = as.character(year))
})

library(janitor)
payments_per_year <- df_binary %>%
  select(last_name, matches("^20(0[9]|1[0-9]|2[0-6])$")) %>%
  adorn_totals("row") %>%
  slice(n()) %>%
  select(-last_name) %>%
  t(.) %>%
  as.data.frame(.) %>%
  rename("payments"=V1) %>%  # payments = total members
  rownames_to_column("year") %>%
  inner_join(.,new_members_per_year, by=c("year"="year_joined")) %>%
  left_join(.,non_renewed)
```

Total_Members, New_Associates, Paid_Quote
```{r}
# reshape data
df_long <- payments_per_year %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(payments, new_members, non_renewed),
               names_to = "class", values_to = "value") %>%
  # filter(!year %in% c("2009","2026")) %>%
  # mutate(label = ifelse(year=="2025"&class=="payments","Total Members",NA)) %>%
  # mutate(label = ifelse(year=="2025"&class=="new_members","New Associates",label)) %>%
  # mutate(label = ifelse(year=="2025"&class=="non_renewed","Non Renewed",label)) %>%
  filter(!year %in% c("2009")) %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(year=="2026"&class=="payments","Total Members",NA)) %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(year=="2026"&class=="new_members","New Associates",label)) %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(year=="2026"&class=="non_renewed","Non Renewed",label)) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) 


plt <- ggplot(
  df_long, aes(year, value, class)
) + 
  # Geometric annotations that play the role of grid lines
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = seq(2010, 2026, by = 1),
    color = "grey91", 
    size = .6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = tibble(y = seq(0, 150, by = 25), x1 = 2010, x2 = 2026),
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey91",
    size = .6
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = class),
    size = .9
  )
plt
```

```{r}
plt.a <- plt + 
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(color = class, label = label),
    family = "Lato",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4,
    direction = "y",
    xlim = c(2026.8, Inf),
    hjust = 0,
    segment.size = .7,
    segment.alpha = .5,
    segment.linetype = "dotted",
    box.padding = .2,
    segment.curvature = -0.1,
    segment.ncp = 3,
    segment.angle = 20
  ) +
  ## coordinate system + scales
  coord_cartesian(
    clip = "off",
    ylim = c(0, 150)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0),
    #limits = c(2010, 2028),
    limits = c(2010, 2030),
    breaks = seq(2010, 2026, by = 4)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 25)
  ) +
  theme(
    #axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, color = "grey40", margin = margin(t = 10)),
    #axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
  )
plt.a
```

```{r}
plt.b <- plt.a + 
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#F2B701", "#E73F74", "#80BA5A")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Membership Trends",
    subtitle = "This line chart tracks changes in key association metrics between 2010 and 2026. It compares the number<br>of <b style='color:#80BA5A'>Total Members</b>, <b style='color:#F2B701'>New Associates</b>, and <b style='color:#E73F74'>Non Renewed</b>, helping visualize growth and engagement trends<br>year over year."
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 10, lineheight = 1.2)
  )
plt.b
```

```{r}
png(file.path(main_folder,"line_chart_up_to_2026.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

plt.b

dev.off()
```




```{r}
payments_per_year2 <- payments_per_year %>% 
  #filter(!year %in% c("2009","2026")) %>% 
  filter(!year %in% c("2009")) %>%
  mutate(year=as.numeric(year))
p3 <- ggplot(payments_per_year2 %>% mutate(year = as.numeric(year)), aes(x = year, y = payments)) +
  # Add vertical lines for each year
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = seq(min(payments_per_year2$year), max(payments_per_year2$year), by = 1),
    color = "grey90",
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  # Line and points
  geom_line(color = "#1f78b4", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#1f78b4", size = 2) +
  # Add labels above points
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = payments),
    size = 4,
    color = "grey30",
    nudge_y = 5,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    segment.color = NA
  ) +
  # Titles and axis labels
  labs(
    title = "Annual Membership Payments",
    subtitle = "Total number of members who paid the annual fee",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Members in Good Standing"
  ) +
  # Ensure every year is labeled on x-axis
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(min(payments_per_year$year), max(payments_per_year$year), by = 2)
  ) +
  # Theme settings
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 13, color = "grey30")
  )
p3

p3 <- ggplot(payments_per_year2, aes(x = year, y = payments)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f78b4", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#1f78b4", size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = payments),
    size = 4,
    color = "grey30",
    nudge_y = 5,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    segment.color = NA
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(min(payments_per_year2$year), seq(min(payments_per_year2$year) + 2, max(payments_per_year2$year), by = 2))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Membership Payments",
    subtitle = "Total number of members who paid the annual fee",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Members in Good Standing"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 13, color = "grey30")
  )
p3
```

```{r}
png(file.path(main_folder,"annual_membership_payments.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

p3

dev.off()
```


# BITS members lost from 2024 to 2025
```{r}
lost_in_25 <- quote_soci %>%
  filter((`2024`=="SI") & (is.na(`2025`))) 

acquired_in_25 <- quote_soci %>%
  filter((`2025`=="SI") & (is.na(`2024`))) 

diff <- quote_soci %>%
  filter(!ID %in% acquired_in_25$ID) %>%
  filter(grepl("^2025", member_since))
write.table(diff, file=file.path(main_folder,"lost_in_25_never_paid.tsv"), 
  col.names = TRUE, row.names = FALSE, sep="\t")

lost_in_25_age_distribution <- lost_in_25 %>% 
  mutate(
    year_joined = year(as.Date(member_since)),
    age_at_leave = floor(interval(birth,"2025-06-01") / years(1))
  ) %>%
  mutate(age_interval_at_leave = cut(as.numeric(age_at_leave), 
                            breaks = c(18,24,34,44,54,64,99), 
                            labels = c("18–24","25–34","35–44","45–54","55–64","65+"),
                            include.lowest = T), .after=age) %>%
  filter(!is.na(year_joined), !is.na(age_interval_at_leave)) %>%
  group_by(age_interval_at_leave) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

p4 <- ggplot(lost_in_25_age_distribution, aes(x = age_interval_at_leave, y = count, fill = age_interval_at_leave)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution of Lost Members from 2024 to 2025",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Lost Members",
    fill = "Age Interval"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    #axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(t = 20)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "grey40", margin = margin(r = 20)),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 1)
  )
p4
```

```{r}
png(file.path(main_folder,"lost_in_25_age_distribution.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

p4

dev.off()
```



#---------

```{r}
membership_from_2009 <- payments_per_year %>%
  select(year, payments, new_members) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(payments, new_members), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")  %>%
  mutate(
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("payments", "new_members"), 
                    labels = c("Active Members", "New Members"))
  )

p5 <- ggplot(membership_from_2009, aes(x = factor(year), y = value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Active Members" = "#80BA5A", "New Members" = "#F2B701")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Active and New Members Over the Years",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = value),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 4
  )
p5

png(file.path(main_folder,"membership_from_2009.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

p5

dev.off()
```

```{r}

membership_from_2020 <- payments_per_year %>%
  select(year, payments, new_members) %>%
  filter(year %in% c("2020","2021","2022","2023","2024","2025")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(payments, new_members), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")  %>%
  mutate(
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("payments", "new_members"), 
                    labels = c("Active Members", "New Members"))
  )

p6 <- ggplot(membership_from_2020, aes(x = factor(year), y = value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Active Members" = "#80BA5A", "New Members" = "#F2B701")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Active and New Members Over the Years",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = value),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 4
  )
p6

png(file.path(main_folder,"membership_from_2020.png"), width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)

p6

dev.off()
```
